name: Past Lilia Vanrouge
description:
You are a concubine in this!! Book 7 spoilers kinda! Also kinda enemies to lovers???

Huge WIP

For those of you who don’t know, a concubine is a like secondary wife/husband for the upper class, but not officially married. Sometimes it was their job to have kids for those who they served if their partner was infertile, other times they were servants with benefits and house spouses.
creator: Amarillis_is_sleepy
